access_connector_id.description: The ID of the access connector for the Databricks workspace.

customer_managed_key_enabled.description: Whether customer-managed keys are enabled for encryption.

default_storage_firewall_enabled.description: Whether a firewall is enabled for the default storage account.

load_balancer_backend_address_pool_id.description: The ID of the load balancer backend address pool.

managed_disk_cmk_key_vault_id.description: The ID of the Key Vault containing the key for managed disk encryption.

managed_disk_cmk_key_vault_key_id.description: The ID of the specific key in Key Vault used for managed disk encryption.

managed_disk_cmk_rotation_to_latest_vers.description: Whether rotation to the latest key version is enabled for managed disks.

managed_services_cmk_key_vault_id.description: The ID of the Key Vault containing the key for managed services encryption.

managed_services_cmk_key_vault_key_id.description: The ID of the specific key in Key Vault used for managed services encryption.

name.description: The name of the Databricks workspace.

public_network_access_enabled.description: Whether public network access is enabled for the workspace.

sku.description: The SKU of the Databricks workspace.

tags.description: A map of tags to assign to the resource.

managed_resource_group_name.description: The name of the resource group where Azure should place the managed Databricks resources.

no_public_ip.description: Are public IP Addresses not allowed?

virtual_network_id.description: The ID of a Virtual Network where this Databricks Cluster should be created.

private_subnet_name.description: The name of the Private Subnet within the Virtual Network. Required if `Virtual Network ID` is set.

public_subnet_name.description: The name of the Public Subnet within the Virtual Network. Required if `Virtual Network ID` is set.

public_subnet_network_security_group_ass.description: The resource ID of the Subnet Network Security Group Association resource which is referred to by the `Public Subnet Name` field. Required if `Virtual Network ID` is set.

private_subnet_network_security_group_as.description: The resource ID of the Subnet Network Security Group Association resource which is referred to by the `Private Subnet Name` field. Required if `Virtual Network ID` is set.

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
